title: Sim
description: Structured representation of a single user Sim (context facet).

sim_id.description: Unique identifier for this Sim (stable across tasks).

sim_type.description: Semantic category of the Sim (e.g., work, health, family, hobby).

priorities.description: Ordered or weighted priorities guiding decision-making.

constraints.description: Checkable constraints that must or should be satisfied.

severity.description: Hard constraints must never be violated; soft constraints may be traded off.

communication_style.description: Expected tone/voice when generating language under this Sim.
